_metadata.description: Display-layer, archetype-anchored top-band normalization. Corrects unreachable structural dimension ceilings so each archetype's best-in-class reads ~95 for consumers, WITHOUT mutating raw_score_100 (the audit/math score). Conservative k=3 convex lift, gated by top_band_eligibility. Anchors R_a are frozen best-in-class raw scores (derived 2026-06-07), not corpus percentiles.
_metadata.notes: raw_score_100 is NEVER changed. display only. confidence band is NOT a gate (artifact-prone for omega/probiotic) — informational only.
